title: Define L0 Discovery Advisor Acceptance Thresholds
objective: Define explicit acceptance thresholds and decision gates for judging L0 discovery advisor evidence before any automatic include_l0 behavior is proposed.
proposed_change: Add a proposal-only decision-review slice that reads the completed evidence corpus from docs/reviews/l0_discovery_advisor_evidence_corpus/evidence.json and records threshold criteria for future automatic L0 discovery decisions. The slice must remain review-only and must not change context selection, prompts, retrieval, embeddings, indexes, memory stores, token-budget behavior, reranking, or adapters.
rationale: PLAN-20260707-0002 proved the evidence-corpus machinery works but produced only a small deterministic corpus.
The evidence corpus has 4 manifests, 2 valid advisor diagnostics, 1 missing advisor diagnostic, and 1 invalid advisor diagnostic.
Automatic include_l0 would be premature without explicit thresholds for usefulness, redundancy, missing diagnostics, invalid diagnostics, and safety.
A threshold review is safer than automatic inclusion because it defines the decision gate before behavior changes.
GAP-0001 remains open because automatic L0 discovery is still not implemented.
constraints: Proposal only: no implementation is admitted by this PLAN record.
No vector index or document index mutation.
No token-budget enforcement or token-budget telemetry.
Review only: read existing evidence and define thresholds; do not alter runtime behavior.
Any threshold-review implementation requires separate admission by WARRANT before governed improvement work begins.
success_criteria: SELF_MODEL records PLAN-20260707-0003 as proposed, open, and not completed.
The proposed slice defines decision thresholds before any automatic L0 discovery behavior is considered.
The proposal explicitly treats the current evidence corpus as insufficient for automatic include_l0 approval.
The proposal keeps advisor output outside ContextPackManifest.items and outside provider prompt construction.
SELF-AUDIT remains green after the proposed PLAN is indexed.
risk: Thresholds may be mistaken for approval of automatic inclusion unless the plan keeps threshold definition separate from selection, prompt construction, retrieval, embeddings, indexes, memory stores, token-budget systems, reranking, and adapters.
next_action: If admitted by a separate WARRANT, implement only a review-only threshold artifact. Do not add automatic include_l0 behavior or any runtime behavior change.
